nasb.text: ‘I am the God of Abraham, and the God of Isaac, and the God of Jacob’? He is not the God of the dead but of the living.”

esv.text: ‘I am the God of Abraham, and the God of Isaac, and the God of Jacob’? He is not God of the dead, but of the living.”

ccb.text: 祂说，‘我是亚伯拉罕的上帝，以撒的上帝，雅各的上帝。’上帝不是死人的上帝，而是活人的上帝。”

csbs.text: ‘我是亚伯拉罕的神、以撒的神、雅各的神。’神不是死人的神，而是活人的神。”
